# Code of Conduct

This project is committed to a welcoming and harassment-free environment for everyone.

## Our Standards

Examples of behavior that contributes to a positive environment:

- Be respectful in language and tone.
- Assume good intent and ask clarifying questions.
- Give constructive, actionable feedback.
- Focus discussions on technical issues and solutions.

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

- Personal attacks, insults, or harassment.
- Discrimination based on identity or background.
- Sexualized language or unwanted attention.
- Publishing private information without consent.

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies to project spaces, including issues, pull requests, discussions, and other community channels.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers are responsible for clarifying and enforcing these standards.
They may remove or edit comments, reject contributions, or take other appropriate action when behavior violates this policy.

## Reporting

To report unacceptable behavior, open a private security report or email the maintainer listed in the repository profile.
All reports will be reviewed promptly and handled with care.

## Attribution

This policy is inspired by common open source community standards and adapted for this repository.
